summary: Learning Schema v2 was already fully implemented. Verified all functionality works correctly: confidence scoring (0.0-1.0 with boost on validation), status tracking (active/disputed/invalidated/expired), decay/expiration logic, and CLI commands (validate, dispute, invalidate, expire-stale). All 5 existing learnings have been migrated with default values. Tested all v2 functions successfully.
learnings: CLI commands in brief had <slug> parameter but actual implementation uses index-only for system learnings (validate <index> not validate <slug> <index>)
Confidence scoring prevents AI contamination by requiring explicit validation to boost learning reliability
Dispute mechanism allows marking learnings as challenged while preserving them for review
Decay days (default 30) provides automatic expiration of unvalidated learnings
